material_findings: 20241204eZeequizzprojectwithchat is a 567704 KB private education/chat repository and requires immediate large-file, student/chat-data, secret and lineage review.
viseron uses dev as its default branch and may process camera streams; branch inventory plus privacy/model/license review is mandatory.
CMGSWindowsServiceSendEmailV20230301 expands the same Windows email-service family as the owner-reported failing job; operational disablement remains separate from this read-only audit.
